extracted.title: Cold Weather Advisory, Effective March 15, 2026
extracted.description:
Northern Border Pipeline Company (NBPL) notifies customers of forecasted cold weather and increased market demand across the system beginning March 15, 2026, through March 17, 2026. Therefore, it is increasingly important that NBPL shippers maintain sufficient receipt and delivery volumes to minimize imbalances, which ensures system integrity.

At this time, NBPL is not taking further action other than to notify customers of the forecasted conditions. NBPL will continue to monitor pipeline operations and the weather forecasts, and may take further action if necessary. Customers are encouraged to continue monitoring critical notices for updates.

Please contact your Customer Services Representative with any questions regarding nominations or scheduling at (866) 581-6487.
